name: peec-humanise
description: Marketplace for peec-humanise — a Claude Code plugin that rewrites Peec AI tracked prompts into the language real people actually search with.

plugins.name: peec-humanise
plugins.description: Rewrite Peec AI tracked prompts to match how real people actually type searches. Grounds rewrites in language harvested from Reddit, HN, Quora, and X for each tracked topic. Presents an interactive curses picker (arrow keys, y/n/a, enter to submit). Respects Peec's delete+create action model.
